name: County Income & Population Change
description: Median household income vs population change for 3,137 US counties (IMS Ch. 1)
studyDescription: Median household income and population change data for 3,137 US counties (5 counties excluded due to missing values). Population change is measured as a percentage from 2010 to 2017. This is an observational study of US Census data.

variableDescriptions.pop_change: Population change from 2010 to 2017 as a percentage. Positive values indicate growth, negative values indicate decline.
variableDescriptions.median_hh_income: Median household income in US dollars for the county.

sourceDetail: OpenIntro IMS, Chapter 1. Source: US Census via usdata::county R package. Public data.
